parameters.query:
INSERT INTO leads (
  first_name, last_name, email, phone, message,
  property_id, property_url, property_title,
  budget, bedrooms, province, city, property_type,
  timeline, financing_type, viewing_requested,
  lead_score, source, utm_medium, utm_campaign,
  ip_address, status, submitted_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.first_name }}', '{{ $json.last_name }}', '{{ $json.email }}',
  '{{ $json.phone }}', '{{ $json.message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.property_id ? `'${$json.property_id}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.property_url }}', '{{ $json.property_title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.budget }}, {{ $json.bedrooms }}, '{{ $json.province }}',
  '{{ $json.city }}', '{{ $json.property_type }}',
  '{{ $json.timeline }}', '{{ $json.financing_type }}',
  {{ $json.viewing_requested }}, {{ $json.lead_score }},
  '{{ $json.source }}', '{{ $json.utm_medium }}', '{{ $json.utm_campaign }}',
  '{{ $json.ip_address }}', '{{ $json.status }}', '{{ $json.submitted_at }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (email, submitted_at) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, email, first_name, lead_score;

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "message": "Thank you for your inquiry! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.", "reference": "{{ $json.id }}" }

parameters.subject: We received your property inquiry - PuraEstate
parameters.message:
=

Inquiry Received

Hi {{ $('Validate & Score Inquiry').item.json.first_name }},

Thank you for contacting PuraEstate! We've received your inquiry and one of our agents will be in touch with you within 24 hours.

{{ $('Validate & Score Inquiry').item.json.property_title ? '

Property you enquired about: ' + $('Validate & Score Inquiry').item.json.property_title + '

' : '' }}

Your inquiry:
{{ $('Validate & Score Inquiry').item.json.message }}

In the meantime, feel free to browse more properties:

Browse Properties

Reference Number: #{{ $('Create Lead in Database').item.json.id }}

PuraEstate | South African Property Intelligence

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  a.id AS agent_id,
  a.name AS agent_name,
  a.email AS agent_email,
  a.phone AS agent_phone
FROM agents a
WHERE a.active = true
AND (a.province_focus = '{{ $('Validate & Score Inquiry').item.json.province }}' OR a.province_focus IS NULL)
ORDER BY (
  SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads l 
  WHERE l.agent_id = a.id 
  AND l.status = 'assigned'
  AND l.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
) ASC
LIMIT 1;

parameters.subject: New Lead Assigned: {{ $('Validate & Score Inquiry').item.json.first_name }} {{ $('Validate & Score Inquiry').item.json.last_name }}

Province: {{ $('Validate & Score Inquiry').item.json.province }}
